clusters.label: Text generators
clusters.description: Autoregressive language models that accept text and generate text.

clusters.label: Multimodal generators
clusters.description: Autoregressive language models whose artifact contract accepts text plus image or audio inputs.

clusters.label: Diffusion language models
clusters.description: Language generators that refine token states with a block-diffusion decoder.

clusters.label: Translation specialists
clusters.description: Language models trained and qualified for text-to-text translation.

clusters.label: Language embedders
clusters.description: Text encoders that return pooled semantic vectors.

clusters.label: Rerankers
clusters.description: Cross-encoders that score the relevance of a text pair.

clusters.label: Protein encoders
clusters.description: Bidirectional protein-sequence encoders that expose token or pooled representations.

clusters.label: Nucleotide encoders
clusters.description: Bidirectional DNA-sequence encoders that expose token or pooled representations.
